source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ CE MDD/■ 3. 3차 CE TCF 보안사항 제출 (12월10일)/01. User Manual/A-TCF-5-020_Language Translation Procedures_REV.0_2020326 (Eng).docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Internal administrative standard A-TCF-5-020 defining the user manual language translation procedure for HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to manage translation of customer-requested local language user manuals, including assignment, third-party translation, review, approval, delivery, and record maintenance.
keyPoints: The standard applies to HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC User Manual translation procedure.
Development is responsible for translating the User Manual on customer demand and may request an outside professional when necessary.
Quality Control Head Manager is responsible for final approval and distribution to related departments.
Translated manual work includes customer request, appointment of person in charge, third-party translation, correction and supervision, completion, and customer delivery.

The standard applies to HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC User Manual translation procedure.

evidence.claim: Development in Charge is responsible for translating the User Manual on customer demand and may request outside professional translation if needed.
evidence.evidenceText: Development in Charge is responsible to translate User Manual in demands of customer. And could request outside professional for translation in necessity.

evidence.claim: Development Head Manager is responsible for internal review and approval request to the Quality Control Head Manager.
evidence.evidenceText: Development Head Manager has responsible for internal review and request approval to Quality Control Head Manager.

evidence.claim: Quality Control Head Manager is responsible for final approval and distribution to related departments.
evidence.evidenceText: Quality Control Head Manager is responsible for final approval, and distributes data to related department.

evidence.claim: Overseas Sales Department informs customers about translated manuals.
evidence.evidenceText: Overseas Sales Department is responsible to inform customers about translated Manual

evidence.claim: The translation process includes customer request, assignment, third-party translation, contract signing, translation, correction and supervision, completion, and customer delivery.
evidence.evidenceText: Customer request; Appointment of person in charge; Commissioned as a translation specialists; Signing a contract; Translation progress; Correction and supervision; Translation complete; Customer delivery

evidence.claim: Records are maintained by Development with storage time of 3 years and possession time of 5 years.
evidence.evidenceText: Record title Maintenance No. Department Storage Time Possession Time Required Required Development 3 years 5 years

evidence.claim: Reference standards are Administrative Document Standard (AQP401) and Record Managing Standard (AQP404).
